page.title: Our Migration & Visa Services
page.description: We offer a wide range of visa and migration services tailored to your individual needs.

home.title: Our Services
home.description: Expert guidance across migration pathways — choose the service that fits your goals.

services.title: Skilled Migration Visas
services.description: We help skilled professionals obtain permanent residency through various skilled visa programs.
services.heroDescription: Explore pathways to permanent residency through Australia’s skilled migration program, tailored to your occupation, experience, and goals.
overview: Skilled migration is designed for professionals whose occupations are in demand in Australia.
We assess your eligibility, guide your skills assessment, and prepare a strong Expression of Interest and visa application.
whoFor: Professionals with occupations on a skilled occupation list
Applicants seeking permanent residency through skilled pathways
Candidates who need help with points, English, or skills assessment
process: Visa lodgement and case management through to decision

services.title: Employer Sponsored Visas
services.description: We assist employers and employees with temporary and permanent work visa solutions.
services.heroDescription: Support for employers and overseas workers navigating sponsorship, nomination, and work visa pathways to Australia.
overview: Employer sponsored visas allow Australian businesses to fill skill shortages with overseas talent.
We work with both employers and applicants to meet sponsorship obligations and lodge compliant applications.
includes: Temporary and permanent work visa options
whoFor: Australian employers seeking to sponsor overseas workers
Overseas professionals with a job offer in Australia
process: Support through to grant and post-grant obligations

services.title: Family & Partner Visas
services.description: Reunite with your loved ones in Australia through partner, parent, and family visas.
services.heroDescription: Help reuniting partners, parents, and family members through Australia’s family migration pathways.
overview: Family and partner visas help eligible sponsors bring loved ones to Australia to live, work, and build a future together.
We guide you through relationship evidence, sponsorship requirements, and a carefully prepared application.
includes: Partner, spouse, and de facto visa advice
Parent and other family visa options
Support through processing and bridging visas
whoFor: Partners of Australian citizens or permanent residents
Families seeking to reunite in Australia
Sponsors who need clear guidance on evidence and eligibility
process: Manage requests for further information until decision

services.title: Student Visas
services.description: We guide students to study in Australia with the right visa and ongoing support.
services.heroDescription: Guidance for international students applying for an Australian student visa with the right course, funds, and documentation.
overview: A student visa lets you study full-time with an eligible education provider in Australia.
We help you meet Genuine Temporary Entrant requirements, arrange OSHC, and lodge a complete application.
whoFor: International students planning to study in Australia
Applicants changing courses or education providers
Families supporting a student’s visa application
process: Support until a decision is made

services.title: Visitor Visas
services.description: Visit Australia for tourism, business, or to meet family and friends.
services.heroDescription: Visitor visa support for tourism, family visits, and short-term business travel to Australia.
overview: Visitor visas are for people who want to visit Australia temporarily for holidays, family, or eligible business activities.
We help you present a clear travel purpose, strong ties to home, and complete supporting documents.
includes: Tourist and family visit visa advice
whoFor: Tourists planning a holiday in Australia
Business travellers attending meetings or conferences
process: Prepare purpose, funds, and ties evidence
Respond to any further information requests

services.title: AAT Appeals & Reviews
services.description: We provide expert assistance with visa refusals, appeals, and AAT matters.
services.heroDescription: Expert support if your visa was refused — including merits review and appeal strategy before the Administrative Review Tribunal.
overview: A visa refusal does not always mean the end of your pathway. In many cases, you may seek merits review within strict time limits.
We review the decision, identify appealable issues, and prepare a clear case for review.
includes: Evidence strategy for hearing or papers review
whoFor: People needing urgent advice on review deadlines
Cases requiring a structured merits review strategy
process: Review the refusal and time limits
Manage the case through to hearing or decision
